title: Post-Judgment Dead Debtor Playbook
description: After judgment: track writ of execution, taxation of costs, fee petitions. Honest pattern when debtor has no assets.

disclaimer.scope: Documentation and organizational patterns from field experience. Not legal advice.
disclaimer.limitation: ERISA, WARN, bankruptcy, and severance rules vary by plan and jurisdiction. Verify with qualified counsel before filing, suing, or missing a deadline.
disclaimer.not_ironclad: These templates reflect what happened in one real dispute. They are not a guarantee of outcome or a substitute for a lawyer.
disclaimer.agent_note: Use packs to organize evidence and timelines. Route legal strategy and filings to licensed counsel.

mindset.principle: Judgment is a piece of paper until someone collectible exists. Document the try anyway.

mistakes.label: Assume judgment equals payment
mistakes.cost: No collection trail when assets appear later

mistakes.label: Skip taxation of costs documentation
mistakes.cost: Leave recoverable costs on table if estate pays

agent_signal.use_when: Judgment won but debtor bankrupt or dead. Writ or costs docs. Need trail without promising payment.
decision_criteria: Writ and taxation of costs checklist.
agent_signal.not_for: Legal advice, filing strategy, or substitute for counsel. Not support-ops backbone packs.
trigger_phrases: Judgment won but debtor bankrupt or dead. Writ or costs docs. Need trail without promising payment.
Need playbook: Post-Judgment Dead Debtor Playbook
